changelog:
v1.6.1.0
- Added language fallback. Thanks to Alexius25 on GitHub
- Removed remaining dead HiAnime code
- Removed: FlareSolverr integration. s.to has moved its provider redirector behind a Cloudflare Turnstile widget that activates per-IP for flagged egress addresses. FlareSolverr cannot solve embedded Turnstile widgets that require user interaction, so the integration was not actually helping affected users. If your server's IP is gated, route the plugin's outbound traffic through a clean proxy via the existing Proxy Server setting (SOCKS5 / HTTP supported).

v1.6.0.0
- Feature: Movie download support for s.to and aniworld.to (#17, thanks @Alexius25)
- Feature: Force option to re-download episodes already marked as downloaded
- Feature: SOCKS5 / HTTP proxy support for outbound traffic to streaming sites
- Feature: Manual "Rebuild download history" scheduled task to resync the database with files on disk
- Fix: Movie detection and downloading reliability
- Fix: Removed legacy scheduled task that was a no-op
- Note: This release also shipped an optional FlareSolverr integration that was removed in v1.6.1.0. See its changelog for details.

v1.5.3.0
- Feature: Configurable s.to base URL in plugin settings — use an alternative domain (e.g. serienstream.to) if s.to is blocked by your ISP
- Fix: ffmpeg not found on Windows servers with custom Jellyfin install locations — removed hardcoded fallback paths in favor of Jellyfin's configured ffmpeg path

v1.5.1.0
- Feature: Maintenance mode to block users from adding episodes to queue
- Feature: Priority queueing for downloads
- Feature: Display user and language for queue elements
- Feature: Better formatted statistics in history view
- Fix: Priority queue not properly displaying in the UI
- Fix: Disabled HiAnime support (service discontinuing)
- Fix: Removed bad symbols from filenames
- Fix: Build error from misplaced constant declaration
- Code cleanup: Extracted magic numbers into named constants

v1.5.0.0
- Feature: HiAnime.to support for English dubbed anime
- Feature: Sidebar access for non-admin users via File Transformation plugin
- Feature: Separated download paths per language
- Feature: Option to disable English-sub downloads for HiAnime and AniWorld
- Feature: Option to force English-dub only downloads for HiAnime
- Feature: HiAnime download merging for more accurate downloads
- Fix: HiAnime wrong episode file naming
- Fix: User downloader panel not responding if admin panel was used before
- Fix: Narrowed folder selection for HiAnime to only HiAnime-accessible titles
- Fix: Hidden irrelevant Download All button for HiAnime source titles
- Fix: Various stability improvements

v1.4.0.1
- Change default AniWorld provider to Vidmoly (faster downloads) with VOE as fallback
- Set default s.to provider to VOE
- Improved README documentation

v1.4.0.0
- Feature: s.to series download support
- Fix: Enable s.to downloader by default
- Fix: Pass season language selection to single episode downloads
- Fix: Prevent duplicate downloads when retrying a failed episode that was re-queued
- Fix: Cleanup empty directories even when download file was never created
- Fix: Cleanup base path for per-site configs, SQLite thread safety, and minor issues
- Fix: Queue display order, cleanup, and race conditions

v1.3.2.0
- Feature: Improved download queue display (downloads tab)
- Feature: Language indicator in title detail view
- Feature: More user-friendly title detail view
- Feature: Episodes refresh when navigating back to title
- Fix: Same episode could be queued multiple times
- Fix: Changing language by redownloading didn't work if language was used before
- Fix: Missing downloaded info in title detail view
- Fix: Download progress not reaching 100% in UI

v1.3.1.0
- Wider Jellyfin compatibility (10.9.0+, down from 10.11.0)
- Jellyfin plugin repository support for easy install and updates
- Automated release pipeline via GitHub Actions

v1.3.0.0
- Removed automatic update check (updates tracked via Jellyfin plugin repo)
- Fix: Unicode smart quotes in filenames normalized to ASCII
- Fix: Brackets stripped from filenames (e.g. [Final Episode])
- Repository link now always visible (hardcoded)

v1.2.0.0
- Feature: Repository link button (GitHub icon) in header
- Feature: Update check — shows banner when new version available
- Feature: Update check toggle + repo URL in settings
- Fix: Clear completed button spacing to download items

v1.1.0.0
- Security: SSRF protection — all API endpoints reject non-aniworld.to URLs
- Security: ffmpeg argument injection prevention via ArgumentList API
- Security: XSS hardening with escJs() helper
- Code cleanup: shared PathHelper, removed dead code
- Feature: Browse tab with Popular and New Releases sections
- Feature: Cover image grid with lazy loading and hover effects

v1.0.0.0
- Fix: HTML entities in episode titles fully decoded
- Feature: Download All Seasons
- Feature: Fallback provider + sidebar navigation link

v0.3.0.0
- Fix: Settings link added to main plugin page for easy access
- Fix: Downloaded status now verifies file exists on disk (handles deleted files)
- Fix: Cancelled downloads now properly clean up partial files from filesystem

v0.2.0.0
- Fix: Version now displays correctly in Jellyfin plugin list
- Fix: Download All now uses preferred language from settings + language selector
- Fix: Season switch race condition resolved
- Fix: Special characters in filenames sanitized

v0.1.0.0 - Initial release
- Search for anime on aniworld.to
- Browse seasons and episodes
- Download episodes via VOE, Vidoza, or Vidmoly
- Track download progress
- Plugin configuration page
description: Search, browse, and download anime and series from aniworld.to, s.to, mkissa.to, miruro.to, and anime.nexus directly within Jellyfin. Supports VOE, Filemoon, Vidoza, and Vidmoly providers with multiple language options including English Dub and English Sub.
name: AniWorld Multi-Site Downloader
overview: Download anime from aniworld.to, s.to, mkissa.to, miruro.to, and anime.nexus directly within Jellyfin
